title: Moderation Commands
cmds: history @user — view a member's case history
case <id> — view a single case (alias: historyview)
historyremoveall @user — wipe a member's case history
reason <id> <text> — update an existing case reason
timeoutlist — list everyone currently timed out

title: Fun Commands
cmds: blacktea — start a blacktea game (alias: bt)
blacktea end — stop the running game in this channel
quote — reply to a message to turn it into a quote image (or random quote)
uwulock @user — force a user's messages to be uwuified (Manage Messages)
blush / pout / smug / wave / dance / cry / smile / happy (solo)

title: Economy & Leveling
cmds: levelrole add <level> <@role> — auto-grant a role at a level (alias: lr)

title: Utility Commands
cmds: whois [@user | id | username] — look up info on any user (even non-members)

title: Embeds & Messages
cmds: embedbuilder — create a new named embed (alias: eb)
eb edit <name> — open builder to edit a saved embed
embed list — list all saved embeds
embed edit <name> — open builder to edit a saved embed
embed resend <name> — resend a saved embed to this channel
embed delete <name> — delete a saved embed
Buttons: Embed, Footer, Author, Add Field, Rename
Buttons: Set Channel, Ping Role, Send & Save, Clear Fields, Reset All
Each system below supports either a plain-text message or a saved embed.
— Vanity Gate (auto-role when vanity is in custom status) —
vanitygate embed <name> — use a saved embed instead
vanitygate scan — apply gate to currently-online members
— Booster Message (when someone boosts) — (aliases: boost, bm) —
— Badge (when someone equips the server tag) —

title: Sticky Messages
cmds: sm <text> — stick a message in the current channel
sm #channel <text> — stick in a specific channel
sm list — list every sticky in this server
-# Once stuck, the bot deletes its previous post and resends after every user message so it stays at the bottom.

title: Welcome Commands
cmds: welcome channel #channel — set the welcome channel
welcome test — send a test welcome message
welcomebuilder — open interactive welcome template editor (alias: wb)
welcomebuilder preview — preview the current template
welcomebuilder reset — restore the default welcome message
leave channel #channel — set the goodbye channel
leave message <text> — set the goodbye text
leave test / leave view / leave disable

title: Fake Permissions Commands
cmds: Valid perms: administrator, manage_messages, moderate_members, manage_nicknames, manage_roles, ban_members, kick_members

title: Settings Commands
cmds: logsetup — split logs into a "depend" category (one channel per type)
customize avatar/banner/bio — change the bot's look in this server only (owner / co-owner / antinuke admin)
autorole add <@role | ID | name> — give a role to every new member
autorole remove <@role | ID | name> — stop autoroling that role
pulse setchannel #channel — auto-post a daily activity digest
pulse disable — turn off daily pulse
starboard channel #channel / threshold <n> / emoji <emoji> / disable — repost ⭐'d messages
buttonrole <@role> [@role2 …] [| text] — post a self-assign button panel
reposter on/off — fix TikTok/X/Instagram/Reddit links with working embeds
bumpreminder channel #ch / message / thankyou / disable — DISBOARD bump reminders
prefix self <symbol> — set YOUR personal prefix (works in every server)
wordstats track <word> / <word> / list / leaderboard <word> — word tracking
-# Booster Message, Badge, and Vanity Gate are in the **Embeds & Messages** category.

title: Suggestions Commands
cmds: suggest set #channel — pick where suggestions get posted (Manage Channels)

title: Anti-Nuke Commands
cmds: an config — open the antinuke configuration panel
an whitelist @user — add or remove a user from the whitelist
an whitelist list — list whitelisted users
an bot @bot — add or remove a bot from the bot whitelist
an bot list — list whitelisted bots
an admin @user — add or remove an antinuke admin (owner/co-owner)
an admin list — list all antinuke admins
an co @user — add or remove a co-owner (server owner only)
an co list — list all co-owners

title: Booster Role Commands
cmds: boosterrole create <#hex> [name] — create your custom booster role (alias: br)
boosterrole color <#hex> — change your role color
boosterrole name <name> — change your role name
boosterrole icon <emoji|url|none> — set the role icon (Boost Lv 2+)
boosterrole share @user — share your role with someone
boosterrole unshare @user — revoke a shared role
boosterrole shared — list who you've shared with
boosterrole delete — delete your booster role

title: Role Commands
cmds: r @user <role> — add or remove a role (auto-toggle)
r create <name> (alias: r make) — create a new role
r rename <role> <new name> — rename a role
r color <role> <#hex | name | random | reset> — change a role color
r icon <role> <emoji | default> — set or clear a role icon (requires boost lvl 2)
r restore @user — restore roles after leave/ban (alias: restore, rolerestore)
r humans @role — give role to every human
r bots @role — give role to every bot

title: Filter & Automod
cmds: filter wordmigrate — push filtered words into native Discord AutoMod
disablecommand <cmd> [#ch/@role] — disable server-wide, in a channel, or for a role
enablecommand <cmd> [#ch/@role] — re-enable globally, in a channel, or grant a role-override (lets that role bypass a server-wide disable)
disablecommandlist / cmdlist — view all disabled commands and role overrides

title: Responders & Commands
cmds: reaction add <emoji> <trigger> — bot auto-reacts to messages containing the trigger
reaction remove <trigger> — remove all reactions for a trigger
reaction remove <emoji> <trigger> — remove just one emoji
reaction list — view all reaction triggers
tags add <name> <response> — create a tag (then `,<name>` to use it)
tags edit / remove / rename / list / random / author <name> / reset
alias removeall <command> — remove every alias for a command
alias view <alias> — see what an alias maps to

title: VoiceMaster Commands
cmds: vmsetup — set up VoiceMaster (choose Simple or Full via buttons)
vm setup — set up VoiceMaster (Simple or Full) — same as vmsetup
vm name <name> — rename your voice channel
vm limit <0-99> — set your channel user limit (0 = unlimited)
vm lock — lock your channel so no one new can join
vm transfer @user — hand channel ownership to another member
vm claim — claim a channel whose owner has left
vm category <id or name> — set the category new public VCs are created under
vm reset — delete all VoiceMaster channels and start over (admin)
setlb — set this channel as the VC leaderboard
setlb reset — wipe all VC time data
setlb resetuser @user — wipe one member's VC time
refreshguide — re-post or refresh the VC guide panel
recap #channel — set where VC session recaps are posted (on/off/reset)
synchemojis — re-sync the VoiceMaster button emojis
vc lock / unlock — secure or open your channel
vc ban @user — reject a member from your channel
vc unban @user — allow a rejected member back
vc permit @user — permit a user or role
vc stfu @user — server-mute a member in your channel
vc unmute @user — unmute a member in your channel
vc transfer @user — hand ownership to another member
vc claim — claim a channel whose owner has left
vc limit <n> — set the user limit (0 = unlimited)
d @user — disconnect a member from their voice channel
massmove #vc — move everyone from your VC to another

title: Invites Commands
cmds: invites [@user] — show how many people a user has invited
invites lb — show the invite leaderboard (one-off)
invites leaderboard #channel — set a live-updating invite leaderboard channel (Admin)

title: Music Commands
cmds: play <song name or URL> — play a song from SoundCloud (alias: p)
queue — show the current queue (alias: q)
skip / next — skip the current song
stop / disconnect / leave — stop and leave the VC
clearqueue — remove all upcoming tracks (alias: cq)
lyrics [song] — fetch lyrics (uses current song if no arg)
seek <seconds> — jump to position in the song
remove <position> — remove a track from the queue
previous / prev / back — go back to the previous track

title: Tickets
cmds: ticket addbutton <label> | <emoji> | <colour> — add a panel button
ticket buttons / removebutton <n> / clearbuttons — manage buttons
ticket panel — post the ticket panel
ticket open — open a ticket via command
ticket close — close the current ticket
ticket add @user — add a user to the ticket
ticket remove @user — remove a user from the ticket
ticket transcript — save a transcript of the channel

title: Server Stats
cmds: stats — server overview (members, channels, roles, boosts)
activity — top 10 channels by message count (last 7d)
channelstats [#channel] — top posters in the last 100 messages
rolemembers @role — list members with that role
inactive [days] — list members in the server for N+ days

title: Misc Utility
cmds: uptime — how long the bot has been running
botinfo — uptime, members, guilds, lines, RAM, CPU (alias: bi)
steal <emoji> [name] — copy an emoji here; or reply to a sticker to steal it (aliases: addemoji, stealemoji)
extractemotes — export all server emojis as image files
sticker steal [name] — reply to a sticker to copy it here
sticker remove [name] / sticker rename <new name> / sticker list
inviteinfo <code> — look up any Discord invite
img <search> — search the web for an image (alias: image)
time <country> — current time for a country or city
coinflips <n> — flip up to 100 coins at once (alias: multiflip)
